strengths: Production-scale TypeScript/React/Node.js expertise with recent AWS CDK experience directly matching tech stack requirements
Unwavering commitment to clean architecture, TDD, and software craftsmanship—values explicitly central to his 15+ year career
Proven fullstack platform development capability across database, backend, and frontend layers across multiple problem domains
concerns: Significant overqualification: Staff/Senior-level background vs. entry-level IC role raises retention and expectation-alignment risks
PostgreSQL not explicitly mentioned: Resume shows SQL and MongoDB expertise but lacks stated PostgreSQL experience
Renewable energy domain exposure limited: GISCollective shows sustainability interests, but no direct energy sector experience in employment history
response.justification: Bogdan brings production-scale expertise in the exact technical stack required—TypeScript, React, Node.js, AWS—with a career-defining commitment to clean architecture and TDD that aligns with the role's values. His recent fullstack platform work and proven ability to integrate multiple data sources across domains make him capable of the integration-heavy responsibilities. While overqualified by seniority, his current transition period and GISCollective work suggest genuine interest in sustainability-focused technical work; his adaptability across frameworks suits the integrations work required.
